# DATA_MODEL.md
# Project-layer file -- fill in for this specific service
# Generated by: aec init
# Last updated: {{INSTALL_DATE}}
#
# This file is read by:
#   - Code Gen Agent (A09) -- correct field names and types in generated code
#   - Data Migration Agent (A12) -- schema migration context
#   - Spec Writer Agent (A07) -- data model changes section of specs
#   - Compliance Agent (A26) -- PII field retention policy audit
#   - Brownfield Discovery Agent (A14) -- data model baseline
#
# List every database table or collection owned by this service.
# For each table, list key fields (not every field -- focus on
# fields that are non-obvious, have business rules, or contain PII).
#
# Retention policy is REQUIRED for any table containing personal data.
# GDPR requires documented retention periods.
#
# Run: npx aec update   after editing this file.

---

| Type | Name | Host (env var) |
|---|---|---|
| [PostgreSQL / SQL Server / MongoDB] | [database-name] | [DB_HOST env var] |

## Entities

### [EntityName] -- table: [table_name]

**Owned by module:** [module name from MODULE_REGISTRY.md]
**Purpose:** [One sentence -- what this table stores]

| Field | Type | Nullable | PII | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| id | UUID | No | No | Primary key |
| [field] | [VARCHAR/INT/NUMERIC/etc] | [Yes/No] | [Yes/No] | [Business rule if any] |
| created_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | No | No | Set by database default |
| updated_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | No | No | Set by trigger or application |

**Key relationships:**
[Describe FK relationships to other entities.
 Example: "An Order has many OrderItems (FK: order_items.order_id -> orders.id)"]

**State machine (if applicable):**
[If the entity has a status field, describe permitted transitions.
 Example: PENDING -> PROCESSING -> COMPLETED or CANCELLED]

**Retention policy:**
[If this table contains personal data -- REQUIRED]
[Example: "Active account duration + 7 years. PII fields anonymised on account deletion."]
[If no PII: "No personal data. Standard 7-year business record retention."]
